title: verbascum subnivale
intro: Verbascum subnivale, also known as the alpine mullein, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is known to have several health benefits, such as soothing respiratory issues and reducing symptoms of colds and flu. The leaves and flowers of Verbascum subnivale can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
